diagrams.title: HashMap Internal Structure
diagrams.description: Shows bucket array with hash collisions handled via linked list (Java 7) or tree (Java 8+), and the resize mechanism when load factor threshold is exceeded.
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how HashMap stores and retrieves entries, and understand performance characteristics under different scenarios.

diagrams.title: Map Interface Hierarchy
diagrams.description: UML-like diagram showing Map interface with subinterfaces (SortedMap, NavigableMap) and implementing classes (HashMap, LinkedHashMap, TreeMap, Hashtable, WeakHashMap, ConcurrentHashMap).
diagrams.purpose: Understand the relationship between different Map implementations and choose appropriate one based on requirements.

diagrams.title: LinkedHashMap Access Order vs Insertion Order
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how LinkedHashMap maintains order - either insertion order (default) or access order (LRU mode), showing how get/put operations modify the linked list.
diagrams.purpose: Understand how to implement LRU caches and understand ordering guarantees of LinkedHashMap.
